---
title: "outputs"
format: html
editor: visual
bibliography: brandon.bib
---

```{=html}
<!--nocite: '@*'
---
-->
```

Below is a curated selection of my scientific outputs and contributions.

### 📚 Selected Publications {#articles}

### 🔬 Data {#data}

### Reports {#report}

### 🗞 Media {#media}

### 🌐 Professional Links

-   GitLab: \@[semantic-nomad](https://gitlab.com/semantic_nomad)
-   GitHub: \@[semantic-nomad](https://github.com/semantic-nomad)
